ingest_command: bcftools view 1kGP_high_coverage_Illumina.chr*.filtered.SNV_INDEL_SV_phased_panel.vcf.gz | bcftools view -i 'INFO/SVTYPE != "."' | llmap variant-ingest --source 1kg_sv_phase3 --kind sv --bucket-bp 100 --output 1kg_sv.priors
notes: Population-stratified AFs (AFR/AMR/EAS/EUR/SAS) available; ingest currently aggregates to global AF only.
